meaning: adj.可抢救的,可打捞的,可挽救的,可挽回的
examples: Some stopped to talk to it. And some picked it over for salvageable parts.
Children who live nearby earn money digging through the debris to find salvageable material.
The movie might have been partly salvageable if Nineteen Hundred's music soared to the heights everyone claims it does.
If Sequesco can do what it says it can, fossil fuels might be more salvageable than we think.
He is trying to save what is salvageable of the American car industry.
